name: Enchant sapphire or opal
rationale: Magic enchant tablet -> Mage, dropped Misc (matches bones-to-X tablet treatment).

name: Bagged nice tree
rationale: POH-garden decoration giving BOTH Construction and Farming XP when planted; added Farming.
comments: This is a construction inout, not a farming input, ewven though it gives farming XP

name: Construction guide
rationale: Readable how-to guide book in a POH bookcase, not a skill input -> Misc.

name: Rune heraldic helm
rationale: Decorative rune full helm (melee defence head-slot). Dropped stray Construction; normalized the family to Cosmetics+Melee.

name: Asgarnian ale
rationale: POH kitchen barrel furniture FLATPACK (not the drinkable ale) -> Construction.

name: Crystal of power
rationale: POH study globe-space furniture flatpack -> Construction; dropped Misc.

name: Banner
rationale: Decorative held flag (weapon slot, NO combat stats) -> Cosmetics only. Dropped Construction/Crafting.

name: Steel heraldic helm
rationale: Decorative steel full helm -> Cosmetics+Melee; dropped Construction.

name: Rune kiteshield
rationale: Decorative rune kiteshield (shield-slot melee armour) -> Cosmetics+Melee; dropped Construction, added Cosmetics.

name: Steel kiteshield
rationale: Decorative steel kiteshield -> Cosmetics+Melee; dropped Construction/Crafting, added Cosmetics.

name: Magic stone
rationale: High-level building material for Construction (POH) AND Sailing (boats/bank chests).

name: Bolt of cloth
rationale: Construction material (beds/curtains) AND a Crafting input for POH banners; added Crafting.

name: Clockwork
rationale: Made at a crafting table and consumed by Crafting to build clockwork toys; dropped Construction.

name: Timber beam
rationale: Shades of Mort'ton quest/minigame building consumable with no other use -> Quests.

name: Void knight top
rationale: Void body armour worn for all three combat styles (full void set) -> Melee+Range+Mage.

name: Void knight mace
rationale: Crush mace that autocasts spells and has a prayer bonus -> Melee+Mage+Prayer (added Melee).

name: Warrior guild token
rationale: Warriors' Guild minigame entry token, not combat gear -> Misc; dropped Melee.

name: Defensive shield
rationale: Warriors' Guild catapult-activity shield usable only on the activity square -> Misc.

name: Steel key
rationale: HAM store-room access key (looted, opens a chest), not a skill input -> Misc. Normalized HAM key family.

name: Coins
rationale: Mage Training Arena alchemist-room coins (made via alchemy spells) -> Mage.

name: Scrapey tree logs
rationale: Knifed for 50 Fletching XP to yield scrapey bark in Trouble Brewing -> Fletching.

name: Rum
rationale: Single-use teleport item back to Trouble Brewing -> Teleports.

name: Monkey
rationale: Caught in Trouble Brewing for Hunter AND Agility XP -> Hunter+Agility; dropped Misc.

name: Pirate hat
rationale: Decorative pirate head item (no combat stats) -> Cosmetics.

name: Bowl of red water
rationale: Trouble Brewing ingredient that gives Cooking XP in the hopper -> Cooking.

name: Scrapey bark
rationale: Knifed from scrapey logs and placed in the hopper for Cooking XP -> Cooking.

name: Skull sceptre
rationale: Teleports to the Stronghold and autocasts Arceuus combat spells -> Mage+Teleports.

name: Gorak claws
rationale: Ground into the magic-essence secondary; usable post-quest -> Herblore (dropped Quests).

name: Magic essence(4)
rationale: Herblore potion that boosts Magic +3, usable post-quest -> Herblore+Mage (dropped Quests).

name: Ivory comb
rationale: Pyramid Plunder vendor loot (sold to Simon Templeton), not a skill input -> Misc. Dropped Agility+Thieving across the artefact family.
comments: There are very few inputs for thieving and agility, so having the outputs that are unique to these skills is okay. For exmaple marks of grace are an outpu/currency, can go in. This comb is an output, unique, acts as currency. Keys from wealthy citizens, output and input. Valuables, output and currency. That are unique to this skills though, gems can be stolen from a gem stall and are not unique as they are a crafting input, so not categorized here. Same with cakes from bakers stall, etc

name: Pharaoh's sceptre
rationale: Charged desert-teleport sceptre (Xeric's-talisman-like) -> Teleports.

name: Red goblin mail
rationale: Dyed goblin armour used in the goblin quest line (unwearable by players) -> Quests. Normalized the dyed-goblin-mail family.

name: Lunar ore
rationale: Mined at 60 Mining and smelted into lunar bar -> Mining+Smithing (dropped Quests).

name: Suqah leather
rationale: Tanned suqah hide sewn into lunar armour -> Crafting (dropped Quests).

name: Lunar staff
rationale: Magic staff (65 Magic) used on the Lunar spellbook -> Mage; dropped Quests AND erroneous Slayer.

name: Guam vial
rationale: Quest-INTERNAL Waking Sleep Potion step with no post-quest use -> Quests (dropped Herblore). Contrast with magic essence which IS usable post-quest.

name: Lunar helm
rationale: Magic-armour head (65 Magic), buyable post-quest from Perdu -> Mage (dropped Quests). Whole lunar set treated this way.

name: Steel bolts
rationale: Fletched crossbow bolts -> added Fletching for consistency with the rest of the bolt family.

name: Rune crossbow
rationale: A fletched Ranged crossbow -> dropped erroneous Slayer.

name: Sapphire bolt tips
rationale: Chiselled from cut gems (a Fletching action) and attached to bolts -> Fletching+Range; dropped Crafting (gem-cutting is an upstream precursor step).

name: Mith grapple tip
rationale: Smithed then Fletching-attached to a bolt (precursor to the grapple) -> Mining+Smithing+Fletching; dropped downstream Agility/Range.

name: Mith grapple
rationale: Finished grapple fired from a crossbow for Agility shortcuts -> Agility+Range; dropped Fletching (it is the use-tab, not a Fletching input).

name: Bolt mould
rationale: A Crafting tool for casting silver bolts -> Crafting; dropped Range.

name: Sinew
rationale: Cooked from raw meat (Cooking) and spun into crossbow string on a wheel (Crafting) -> Cooking+Crafting; the Fletching tag was wrong.
comments: Remove from Cooking, this is likely a singular gut-feel exception

name: Bronze crossbow (u)
rationale: Unstrung crossbow (a Fletching intermediate, not yet a usable weapon) -> Fletching; dropped Range. Same for all (u) crossbows/stocks/limbs.

name: Sawdust
rationale: No-use sawmill byproduct -> Misc; dropped Construction.

name: Grand seed pod
rationale: Single-use Grand Tree teleport that grants 100 Farming XP when launched -> Farming+Teleports.
comments: Teleport only, giving XP is not the same as being an actual input or output of the skill

name: Crystal saw
rationale: Permanent Construction tool granting a +3 Construction boost -> Construction (dropped Quests).

name: Citizen top
rationale: Meiyerditch disguise outfit -> Cosmetics. Normalized Vyrewatch + Citizen disguise outfits to Cosmetics.
comments: Keep this in quests and cosmetic, as it's only real use is in quests though you can still wear it for cosmetic afterwards, that's not it's intended use

name: Proselyte sallet
rationale: Prayer-bonus melee Temple Knight helm, usable/tradeable -> Melee+Prayer (dropped Quests).

name: Water rune
rationale: Quest-only 'rune' that cannot cast spells (Slug Menace) -> Quests; dropped Runecraft. Applied to all five quest runes.

name: Elemental helmet
rationale: Magic helmet (magic defence), tradeable/usable post-quest -> Mage (dropped Quests).

name: Mind shield
rationale: Magic shield (magic defence) -> Mage; dropped erroneous Slayer.

name: Combat potion(4)
rationale: Herblore potion that boosts Attack and Strength -> Herblore+Melee.

name: Attack cape
rationale: BIG RULE CALL: skillcape = level-99 prestige/fashion cape. Added Cosmetics to ALL skillcapes (their hoods were already Cosmetics+skill). Kept the skill tab too. Please confirm you want Cosmetics added to every 99 cape.
comments: Good call on cosmetics for skill capes

name: Quest point cape
rationale: All-quests prestige cape -> Quests+Cosmetics (added Cosmetics, matching the skillcape treatment).

name: Farming manual
rationale: Readable Farming guide book (not a Farming input) -> Misc.

name: Bomber jacket
rationale: Enlightened Journey costume-reward body item -> Cosmetics (dropped Quests).

name: Roast beast meat
rationale: Cooked food with sub-12 heal -> Cooking only; dropped Melee (matches the cave-eel sub-12 rule).

name: Spotted cape
rationale: Weight-reducing cape made from Hunter fur -> Agility+Hunter; added Agility+Thieving to match the spottier cape.

name: Spiky vambraces
rationale: Leather ranger hand armour (kebbit claws attached) -> Range; dropped the Crafting making-step. Normalized ALL spiky vambrace variants to Range.

name: Black spiky vambraces
rationale: Black dragonhide ranger hand armour -> Range; dropped erroneous Hunter/Melee (it is ranger armour with a minor +2 str).

name: Kebbit claws
rationale: Hunter drop attached to vambraces via Crafting -> Hunter+Crafting; dropped Range (the resulting vambraces are Range, not the claws).

name: Dark kebbit fur
rationale: Hunter fur used to make gloves of silence -> Hunter; dropped downstream Agility+Thieving for fur-family consistency.

name: Raw rainbow fish
rationale: A Fishing catch that is cooked; only the bait (stripy feather) is Hunter -> Cooking+Fishing (dropped Hunter).

name: Orange salamander
rationale: Hunter-caught multi-style weapon (scorch=melee/flare=ranged/blaze=magic) -> Hunter+Melee+Range+Mage. Applied to all salamanders + swamp lizard.
comments: Verify, my understanding is that this is ranged. Check witki and go with results there, expand search to conversations on reddit for verification if wiki is ambiguous

name: Bird book
rationale: Eagles' Peak quest book -> Quests; dropped Hunter.

name: Willow comp bow
rationale: Functional Ranged composite bow (Treasure Trail reward) -> Range; dropped erroneous Cosmetics (yew/magic comp bows were Range only).
